items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
Halftime: #Magic 65, Sixers 37

Jase Richardson (3 for 4 from 3) has 17 points, Lester Quinones with 10 points, Noah Penda has 6 points, 3 rebounds and 5 assists and Colin Castleton with 8 points and 6 rebounds.

Orlando’s starters have completely controlled this one.

items.title: Some disaster turnovers for the Pacers that half simply inbounding the ball. And they had 18 fouls. Just a lot of sloppy, summer league basketball. Some good stuff, too, including a 12-point, four-block half from Jalen Slawson.

items.body_excerpt: Some disaster turnovers for the Pacers that half simply inbounding the ball. And they had 18 fouls. Just a lot of sloppy, summer league basketball. Some good stuff, too, including a 12-point, four-block half from Jalen Slawson.

items.author: Jason Beede

End of the 1st quarter: #Magic 30, Sixers 17

Jase Richardson (2 for 3 from 3) leads with 10 points, Alex Morales has 6 points and 4 rebounds, and 5 points apiece from Lester Quinones and Philip Wheeler.

Orlando shot 6 for 9 from 3, Philadelphia 3 for 10.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Lorenzo Williams. Stetson C was undrafted in 91, played in minors & on 10 day deals. In 94-95, got DAL C job, had 4 ppg, 8.4 rpg, 1.8 bpg in 29 mpg. Played hard but had no scoring at all. Cut in 96 & was w/WAS from 96-00 (but only played 41 gms in that span).
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Lorenzo Williams. Stetson C was undrafted in 91, played in minors & on 10 day deals. In 94-95, got DAL C job, had 4 ppg, 8.4 rpg, 1.8 bpg in 29 mpg. Played hard but had no scoring at all. Cut in 96 & was w/WAS from 96-00 (but only played 41 gms in that span).
